title: Floral Gooey Jamaican Lamb Kidney Stir-fry
description: A lazy Sunday dish featuring a low-calorie-friendly floral and gooey Jamaican lamb kidney stir-fry with aromatic spices to enhance the flavors.
instructions: Clean the lamb kidneys thoroughly and pat them dry with paper towels.
Slice a medium onion into thin strips, finely chop 3 garlic cloves, finely chop fresh or dried thyme leaves, and slice two lemon for garnish if desired.
Season each kidney lightly with Jamaican Jerk Spice Blend on both sides. Place the seasoned kidneys in an oven-safe dish.
Roast the kidneys in the preheated oven for about 15 minutes until they are tender when pierced with a fork.
While the kidneys are roasting, heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add finely chopped onions and minced garlic to the hot skillet. Sauté until onions become translucent.
Remove the roasted lamb kidneys from the oven and place them back into the skillet along with sliced thyme leaves.
Drizzle remaining olive oil over the kidney slices, stir gently, and cook for another 2-3 minutes until they are fully cooked through and slightly crispy on the outside if desired.
Serve immediately with lemon slices, garnished with extra thyme leaves if you like a burst of freshness.
